author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: refactor(GeoSearch): drop support for paddingBoundingBox (#3319)
body:
* refactor(Geo): drop support for PaddingBoundingBox

* docs(migrations): add note about paddingBoundingBox

* docs(geo): fix typo in migration guide

* refactor(geo): remove support for position related options [PART-2] (#3156)

* refactor(geo): implement currentRefinement [PART-3] (#3157)

* refactor(geo): implement controlled map [PART-4] (#3158)

* refactor(geo): implement routing [PART-5] (#3159)

* refactor(geo): implement static map [PART-6] (#3160)

* docs(GeoSearch): use fixed dimensions to avoid zoom issues

* test(GeoSearchControls): fix typo in description

Co-Authored-By: samouss <samuel.vllnt@gmail.com>

* refactor(GeoSearch): flatten templates (#3320)

* refactor(GeoSearch): move HTMLMarker template to templates

* chore(GeoSearch): update stories usage

* docs(GeoSearch): move HTMLMarker template to templates

* refactor(GeoSearch): allow HTMLMarker with template only

* docs(GeoSearch): drop documentation about boolean
